title: 猿辅导 Launches AI Big Reading, Develops Intelligent Reading Product for Adolescents
excerpt: During the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC), Yuanfudao Group officially launched its self-developed product "Yuanfu AI Big Reading." This pr
content_html:
During the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC), Yuanfudao Group officially launched its self-developed product "Yuanfu AI Big Reading." This product is not simply digitizing printed books, but rather building a personalized reading companion through AI, drawing on Socratic dialogue logic to guide children to read independently, think critically, and express themselves actively, creating a complete reading loop of "stimulating interest - deep understanding - output of results."

Ma Min, Vice President of Yuanfudao Group, stated that generative AI is improving the efficiency of information access, but the stronger the information capability, the more users need to have independent judgment and autonomous thinking skills. AI is good at solving existing problems, but it cannot replace human ability to identify problems and explore innovations. This is also the important value of deep reading.

Ma Min pointed out that in the field of reading education, there has long been a challenge of balancing high-quality content, scalable services, and personalized guidance. In family settings, parents find it difficult to consistently accompany children in deep reading; professional one-on-one reading companions are costly and hard to popularize; traditional reading courses often focus on knowledge transmission, lacking space for developing expression and critical thinking skills.

To address these issues, Yuanfu AI Big Reading provides a personalized reading experience through an AI reading companion model. The product combines movie-grade 3D immersive animation and professional voiceover content, designing unique reading companions for different books. For example, when reading "Journey to the West," the system offers a humorous storyteller companion; when reading "The Little Prince," it uses a pilot character to enhance interactive experience, lowering the entry barrier for teenagers to start reading.

In the core reading process, the product uses a multi-round progressive questioning approach to guide children to think about the text content, rather than directly providing standard answers. After completing the entire book, the system will generate a personalized reading sharing short film based on the child's reading process, interaction records, and thinking content, strengthening the display of reading achievements through the "Shining Moment."

sentences.en: For example, when reading "Journey to the West," the system offers a humorous storyteller companion; when reading "The Little Prince," it uses a pilot character to enhance interactive experience, lowering the entry barrier for teenagers to start reading.
sentences.zh: 例如，阅读《西游记》时，系统提供幽默的说书伴侣；在阅读《小王子》时，它利用引导角色来增强互动体验，降低青少年开始阅读的入门门槛。

sentences.zh: 在核心阅读过程中，产品采用多轮递进提问的方式引导孩子思考文本内容，而不是直接提供标准答案。

sentences.en: After completing the entire book, the system will generate a personalized reading sharing short film based on the child's reading process, interaction records, and thinking content, strengthening the display of reading achievements through the "Shining Moment."
sentences.zh: 读完整本书后，系统会根据孩子的阅读过程、互动记录、思考内容生成个性化的阅读分享短片，通过“闪亮时刻”强化阅读成果的展示。

content_html_zh:
2026世界人工智能大会（WAIC）期间，猿辅导集团正式推出自主研发产品“猿辅导AI大读”。 该产品不是简单地将纸质书籍数字化，而是通过AI打造个性化的阅读伴侣，借鉴苏格拉底对话逻辑，引导孩子独立阅读、批判性思考、主动表达，打造“激发兴趣-深度理解-结果输出”的完整阅读循环。

猿辅导集团副总裁马敏表示，生成式AI正在提高信息获取效率，但信息能力越强，越需要用户具备独立判断和自主思维能力。 人工智能擅长解决现有问题，但无法取代人类发现问题和探索创新的能力。 这也是深度阅读的重要价值。

马敏指出，在阅读教育领域，长期以来一直面临着平衡高质量内容、可扩展服务和个性化指导的挑战。 在家庭环境中，家长很难持续陪伴孩子进行深度阅读；专业的一对一阅读伴侣成本高昂且难以普及；传统阅读课程往往注重知识传播，缺乏培养表达能力和批判性思维能力的空间。

针对这些问题，元赋AI大阅读通过AI阅读伴侣模型，提供个性化的阅读体验。 该产品结合电影级3D沉浸式动画和专业配音内容，为不同的书籍设计独特的阅读伴侣。 例如，阅读《西游记》时，系统提供幽默的说书伴侣；在阅读《小王子》时，它利用引导角色来增强互动体验，降低青少年开始阅读的入门门槛。

在核心阅读过程中，产品采用多轮递进提问的方式引导孩子思考文本内容，而不是直接提供标准答案。 读完整本书后，系统会根据孩子的阅读过程、互动记录、思考内容生成个性化的阅读分享短片，通过“闪亮时刻”强化阅读成果的展示。
